emailVerification.subject: Verify your email
emailVerification.intro: Thanks for signing up. Confirm your email to activate your account:
emailVerification.ignore: If you didn't create this account, you can ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Password recovery
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password. The link is valid for {ttlMinutes} minutes:
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this change, you can ignore this email.
